title: senecio nervatus
intro: Senecio nervatus, also known as Nervous Groundsel, is a plant species native to the mountainous regions of New Zealand. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include astringent and antiseptic qualities. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including the treatment of colds, fever, and rheumatism, as well as its use as a digestive aid and a treatment for skin conditions. In terms of herbal preparations, Senecio nervatus is typically used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its use should be approached with caution due to potential toxicity and side effects.
